schemas.name: Virtual Auditor
schemas.description: AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm offering IBBI-compliant valuations (ESOP, FEMA, Income Tax, Companies Act, SEBI, IBC, 409A, complex instruments, AIF), FEMA compliance, GST and income tax appeals, forensic accounting, company registration, and secretarial services across India.

mainEntity.name: Can OPC have more than 1 director?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Minimum 1, maximum 15 directors. But only 1 member (shareholder).

mainEntity.name: What is the OPC turnover limit?

acceptedAnswer.text: Turnover >₹2 crore or capital >₹50 lakhs triggers mandatory conversion to Pvt Ltd within 6 months.
Yes, since April 2021. Indian citizens residing abroad can form OPCs in India.
OPC must designate a nominee (Indian resident) who becomes the member if the original member dies or becomes incapacitated. Nominee consent required at incorporation.

mainEntity.name: What is the benefit of OPC over proprietorship?

acceptedAnswer.text: Limited liability (personal assets protected), separate legal entity, can open company bank account, easier to get business loans, and can convert to Pvt Ltd when ready for expansion or funding.
Yes, since April 2021. NRIs and foreign nationals can form OPC in India. Must appoint a nominee who is Indian resident. No minimum paid-up capital requirement.

mainEntity.name: What is the threshold for OPC to convert to Pvt Ltd?

acceptedAnswer.text: Mandatory conversion if: paid-up capital exceeds ₹50 lakhs OR average annual turnover exceeds ₹2 crore for 3 consecutive years. Voluntary conversion allowed anytime.

mainEntity.name: What compliance is required for OPC?

acceptedAnswer.text: Annual filing: AOC-4 and MGT-7A. Board meeting: minimum 1 per half-year. Financial statements: must be prepared. Tax audit if turnover exceeds ₹1 crore. GST returns if registered. Lighter than Pvt Ltd.

mainEntity.name: How much does OPC registration cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: From ₹8,999 all-inclusive. Covers DSC, DIN, name reservation, incorporation filing, MOA/AOA, PAN/TAN. Single director + one nominee required. 5-15 working days.
